steps.text: Here's the Scale of 10 button. I'll click it now. Watch what happens when we use a scale this large for very small data.

incorrects.description: Student did not click Scale of 1 after two attempts. System models the interaction.

params.description: Scale of 1 button highlights on scale selector.

steps.text: Here's the Scale of 1 button. I'll click it now. Notice how every bar lands right on a tick mark. 3 is on the line marked 3. 5 is on the line marked 5. 7 is on the line marked 7. 9 is on the line marked 9. For very small numbers, Scale of 1 is simple and exact. That's why it works so well here.
